name: Product Pricing Guide 2026
description: The official pricing and product guide for FirstUK Bank effective from January 15, 2026. It serves as a reference for staff, customers, sales, and marketing departments.

name: Price Review Policy
description: The bank's policy regarding the frequency and timing of pricing reviews for retail banking products. Prices are reviewed on a quarterly basis and updated as required.
context: Prices reviewed quarterly and updated as needed.

name: SmartSaver Account
description: A savings product offered by FirstUK Bank with a variable interest rate structure based on the Bank of England Base Rate.

name: SmartSaver Variable Rate — Bank of England Base Rate + 2.5% Margin
description: A variable interest rate applied to the SmartSaver Account, calculated as the Bank of England Base Rate plus a 2.5% margin. The rate is subject to monthly review.
context: Base Calculation: Bank of England Base Rate + 2.5% Margin

name: SmartSaver Interest Rate Review Policy
description: The contractual provision stating that the interest rate for the SmartSaver account is variable and is reviewed by the bank on a monthly basis.

name: Interest Rate Tier 1 — 4.50% AER/Gross (£0–£10,000)
description: The first interest rate tier applying to balances between £0 and £10,000, offering an annual interest rate of 4.50% AER and Gross.

name: Interest Rate Tier 2 — 4.70% AER/Gross (£10,001–£50,000)
description: The second interest rate tier applying to balances between £10,001 and £50,000, offering an annual interest rate of 4.70% AER and Gross.

name: Interest Rate Tier 3 — 4.80% AER/Gross (£50,001+)
description: The highest interest rate tier applying to balances exceeding £50,000, offering an annual interest rate of 4.80% AER and Gross.

name: Interest Accrual Rule
description: The contractual provision defining how interest is calculated and paid. Interest is calculated daily and paid on the last business day of the month.
context: Interest Accrual: Monthly (calculated daily, paid on last business day of month)

name: Interest Rate Variation Basis
description: The contractual framework governing how the product's interest rate is adjusted. It is tied to the Bank of England Base Rate with a fixed margin of 2.5%, reviewed monthly.
context: Trigger: Bank of England Base Rate changes
Basis: BoE Base Rate + 2.5% Margin (fixed margin)

name: Rate Change Email Notifications
description: An opt-in service that allows customers to receive email alerts whenever the product's interest rate changes.
context: Notification: Email alert when rate changes (customer can opt-in)

name: Rate Change Effective Date Clause
description: The provision specifying that any changes to the interest rate become effective on the 1st of the month following the trigger event.
context: Effective Date: Rate change effective 1st of following month

name: Variable Rate — BoE Base Rate + 2.5% Margin
description: A variable interest rate calculated by adding a fixed margin of 2.5% to the current Bank of England Base Rate.
context: Basis: BoE Base Rate + 2.5% Margin (fixed margin)

name: Monthly Maintenance Fee — £0.00
description: A recurring monthly charge for the maintenance of the account. This fee is explicitly set at £0.00, indicating the service is free for the customer.

name: Minimum Opening Balance Requirement — £1.00
description: The minimum amount of funds required to be deposited by a customer to successfully open the account. The required threshold is £1.00.

name: Maximum Balance Limit Provision
description: The contractual limit on the total balance a customer can hold within the account. The document specifies that there is no upper limit on the balance.

name: Overdraft Facility Availability
description: The capability for an account to go into a negative balance. This specific product does not offer an overdraft facility.

name: ATM Withdrawal (UK) Fee — £0.00
description: A fee applied to ATM withdrawals made within the UK. This service is explicitly provided at no cost to the customer.

name: ATM Withdrawal (International) Fee — £2.50
description: A charge of £2.50 levied on the customer for each ATM withdrawal performed internationally.

name: International Transfer Fee — £5.00
description: A specific charge of £5.00 applied to each international transfer transaction.

name: Domestic Transfer Fee — £0.00
description: A fee applied to domestic transfers. This service is explicitly provided at no cost to the customer.

name: Standing Order Fee — £0.00
description: A fee associated with the setup or execution of standing orders. This service is explicitly provided at no cost to the customer.

name: Direct Debit Fee — £0.00
description: A fee associated with the processing of direct debits. This service is explicitly provided at no cost to the customer.

name: Debit Card (Initial) — £0.00
description: A fee of £0.00 is charged for the issuance of the initial debit card.

name: Card Replacement — £15.00
description: A charge of £15.00 is applied when a customer requests a replacement card.

name: Expedited Card Replacement (1–2 days) — £25.00
description: A premium fee of £25.00 is charged for expedited delivery of a replacement card within 1–2 days.

name: Virtual Card Number (for online shopping) — £0.00
description: The provision of virtual card numbers for the purpose of online shopping is offered at no cost (£0.00).

name: Debit Card
description: The physical payment card issued to the customer, subject to initial and replacement fees.

name: Virtual Card Number
description: A digital card number provided specifically for use in online shopping transactions.

name: Account Closure Fee — £0.00
description: The cost associated with closing the account. The bank explicitly states there is no charge for this service.

name: Statement Reprint Fee — £0.00
description: The cost for requesting a reprinted copy of an account statement. This service is provided free of charge.

name: Dormancy Letter Fee — £0.00
description: The cost for issuing a letter regarding account dormancy. There is no fee charged for this notification.

name: Chequebook Fee — £0.00
description: The cost for a chequebook, where offered. This service is provided at no cost to the customer.

name: Total Annual Cost (Typical Customer) — £0.00
description: The estimated total annual cost for a typical customer using the product. The document explicitly states there are no fees.

name: SmartSaver Plus Account
description: A premium savings product offered by FirstUK Bank with a variable interest rate based on the Bank of England Base Rate plus a margin.

name: SmartSaver Plus Variable Rate — BoE Base Rate + 2.75% Margin (£50,001+)
description: A variable interest rate applied to balances of £50,001 and above. The rate is reviewed monthly and calculated as the Bank of England Base Rate plus a 2.75% margin.
context: Base Calculation: Bank of England Base Rate + 2.75% Margin

name: SmartSaver Plus Minimum Balance Requirement
description: A balance requirement specifying that a minimum of £50,001 is needed to qualify for the specific interest rate tier of the SmartSaver Plus account.

name: Universal Savings Rate — 5.25% AER (All balances)
description: A flat interest rate of 5.25% AER applied to all account balances regardless of the amount held. Interest is accrued on a monthly basis.

name: Interest Calculation and Accrual Rule
description: The provision governing how interest is calculated and credited to the account. It specifies that interest accrues monthly based on the AER.

name: Premium Account Fee — £0.00
description: A monthly maintenance fee for the Premium Account which is currently set at £0.00, as it is offset by higher interest rates.
context: Premium Account Fee: £0.00 (offset by higher rates)

name: Premium Account
description: A banking product that offers higher interest rates to offset its account fees.
context: Premium Account Fee: £0.00 (offset by higher rates)

name: SmartSaver Account
description: A banking product whose fee structure serves as the baseline for other account types, including the Premium Account.
context: All Other Fees: Same as SmartSaver Account

name: Dedicated Relationship Manager
description: A value-added service providing the customer with a dedicated relationship manager accessible via phone support.

name: Priority Customer Service
description: An enhanced customer service feature that guarantees a response time within 24 hours.

name: Annual Financial Planning Review
description: A value-added service consisting of a financial planning review conducted on an annual basis.

name: Waived International Transfer Fee (£0)
description: A fee waiver for international transfers, meaning the customer is not charged for these transactions.

name: Current Account
description: A standard banking product offered by FirstUK Bank for everyday financial transactions. It carries the product code CURR-001.

name: Current Account Savings Interest — £0.00
description: The interest rate applicable to balances held within the Current Account. This product does not accrue interest.
context: Savings Interest: £0.00 (no interest on current account)

name: Arranged Overdraft Interest Rate — 15.00% AER
description: The annual equivalent rate (AER) applied to balances when the account is in an arranged overdraft position.

name: Arranged Overdraft Rate — 15%
description: An interest rate of 15% applied to an arranged overdraft limit of £1,000. This results in a daily interest charge of £0.41 and a monthly charge of £12.50.

name: Unarranged Overdraft Rate — 25.00% AER
description: An interest rate of 25.00% AER applied to overdrafts that have not been previously arranged with the bank.

name: Unarranged Overdraft Daily Fee — £5
description: A recurring daily charge of £5 levied on customers using an unarranged overdraft facility.

name: Monthly Account Fee — £0.00
description: A monthly charge levied on the account, which is explicitly set to zero pounds.

name: Overdraft Arrangement Fee — £0.00 (first time)
description: A fee charged for the initial arrangement of an overdraft, which is free for the first time.

name: Domestic Transfer Fee — £0.00
description: A transaction fee applied to domestic transfers. The cost for this service is explicitly stated as £0.00.

name: International Transfer Fee — £8.00
description: A transaction fee applied to international transfers, charged at a rate of £8.00 per transaction.

name: UK ATM Withdrawal Fee — £0.00
description: A fee for withdrawing cash from an ATM within the UK. The cost for this service is explicitly stated as £0.00.

name: International ATM Withdrawal Fee — £3.00
description: A fee applied to cash withdrawals made at ATMs outside of the UK, charged at £3.00 per transaction.

name: Overdraft Interest Rate — 15.00% AER
description: The annual equivalent rate of interest applied to overdraft balances.

name: Unarranged Overdraft Fee — 25.00% AER + £5/day
description: A combination of an interest rate and a daily charge applied when a customer exceeds their arranged overdraft limit. It consists of a 25.00% AER interest rate plus a £5 per day fee.

name: SmartSaver Account
description: A banking product referenced as the baseline for card fee structures in the document.

name: Annual Card Fee — £0.00 (No Overdraft Use)
description: The total annual cost for card usage when no overdraft is utilized is explicitly stated as zero.

name: Annual Overdraft Interest Cost — ~£300 (£2,000 Usage)
description: The approximate total annual interest cost incurred when the customer utilizes a £2,000 overdraft.
context: Total Annual Cost (With £2,000 Overdraft Usage): ~£300 (interest only)

name: Mortgage Product
description: A mortgage lending product offered by FirstUK Bank, identified by product code MORT-001. It offers multiple interest rate options including fixed and variable terms.

name: Fixed Rate 2 Year
description: A fixed interest rate option for the Mortgage Product (MORT-001) applicable for a term of two years.

name: Fixed Rate 5 Year
description: A fixed interest rate option for the Mortgage Product (MORT-001) applicable for a term of five years.

name: Variable Rate (tracker)
description: A variable interest rate option for the Mortgage Product (MORT-001) that tracks a benchmark rate.

name: Residential Mortgage
description: A mortgage product for residential properties offering a variety of fixed and variable rate options based on the Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio.

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 2-Yr Rate — 4.50% (<60% LTV)
description: A 2-year fixed interest rate of 4.50% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio of less than 60%.

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 5-Yr Rate — 5.00% (<60% LTV)
description: A 5-year fixed interest rate of 5.00% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio of less than 60%.

name: Residential Mortgage Variable Rate — Base + 1.5% (<60% LTV)
description: A variable interest rate calculated as the Bank of England Base rate plus a 1.5% margin for mortgages with less than 60% LTV.
context: Current Variable Rate Example (at BoE Base 4.0%): 5.50% (Base 4.0% + 1.5% margin)

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 2-Yr Rate — 4.75% (60–80% LTV)
description: A 2-year fixed interest rate of 4.75% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio between 60% and 80%.

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 5-Yr Rate — 5.25% (60–80% LTV)
description: A 5-year fixed interest rate of 5.25% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio between 60% and 80%.

name: Residential Mortgage Variable Rate — Base + 1.75% (60–80% LTV)
description: A variable interest rate calculated as the Bank of England Base rate plus a 1.75% margin for mortgages with 60-80% LTV.

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 2-Yr Rate — 5.25% (80%+ LTV)
description: A 2-year fixed interest rate of 5.25% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio of 80% or more.

name: Residential Mortgage Fixed 5-Yr Rate — 5.75% (80%+ LTV)
description: A 5-year fixed interest rate of 5.75% applicable to residential mortgages with a Loan-to-Value ratio of 80% or more.

name: Residential Mortgage Variable Rate — Base + 2.25% (80%+ LTV)
description: A variable interest rate calculated as the Bank of England Base rate plus a 2.25% margin for mortgages with 80% or more LTV.

name: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Requirements
description: The mortgage product applies different interest rates based on the Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio of the property, with tiers defined at <60%, 60-80%, and 80%一个+.

name: Fixed Rate 2-Year Mortgage
description: A mortgage product where the interest rate remains fixed for a period of 2 years, after which it is re-fixed.
context: Fixed Rate 2-Year: Fixed for 2 years, then re-fixed

name: Fixed Rate 5-Year Mortgage
description: A mortgage product where the interest rate remains fixed for a period of 5 years, after which it is re-fixed.
context: Fixed Rate 5-Year: Fixed for 5 years, then re-fixed

name: Early Repayment Fee (Fixed Rate) — 1–3% of outstanding balance
description: A penalty charge applied if a customer makes an early repayment during the fixed rate period. The fee is typically between 1% and 3% of the outstanding balance.
context: Early Repayment Fee (Fixed Rate): Typically 1–3% of outstanding balance (if early repayment during fixed period)

name: Arrangement Fee — Included (no separate fee)
description: A mortgage arrangement fee that is included in the product cost, meaning no separate charge is levied on the customer.

name: Valuation Fee — Included (FirstUK Bank covers)
description: A fee for property valuation which is covered by FirstUK Bank, resulting in no cost to the customer.

name: Legal Fees (Conveyancing) — Customer's cost (~£1,200–£2,000)
description: Legal costs associated with conveyancing that are the responsibility of the customer, estimated between £1,200 and £2,000.

name: Mortgage Protection Insurance — Optional (varies by provider)
description: An optional insurance fee for mortgage protection, the cost of which varies depending on the chosen provider.
context: Mortgage Protection Insurance | Optional, varies by provider

name: Booking Fee — £0.00
description: A fee charged to lock in a specific mortgage rate, which is explicitly set at £0.00.

name: Fixed Rate Mortgage
description: A mortgage product featuring a fixed interest rate for a specified term, providing protection against rate rises.
context: Fixed rate protects against rate rises during term

name: Fixed Mortgage Rate — 5.00% (£200,000 balance)
description: A fixed interest rate of 5.00% applied to a mortgage balance of £200,000 over a 25-year term.

name: Re-fixed Mortgage Rate — 5.50% (Year 3+)
description: A potential re-fixed interest rate of 5.50% applicable from the third year onwards.

name: Rate Rise Protection
description: A feature of the fixed rate mortgage that protects the customer from interest rate increases during the fixed term.
context: Fixed rate protects against rate rises during term

name: Visa Debit Card
description: A Visa Debit payment card issued by FirstUK Bank. It is linked to the customer's account for electronic payments and withdrawals.

name: Annual Fee — £0.00
description: The annual charge for maintaining the Visa Debit card, which is explicitly stated as zero.

name: Standard Replacement Fee — £15.00
description: A charge of £15.00 levied on the customer for the issuance of a replacement Visa Debit card under standard delivery terms.

name: Expedited Replacement Fee — £25.00
description: A premium charge of £25.00 for the replacement of a Visa Debit card when expedited 1–2 day delivery is requested.

name: UK ATM Withdrawal Fee — £0.00
description: A charge of £0.00 for withdrawing cash from ATMs within the UK, subject to a daily limit of £500.

name: International ATM Fee — £2.50 per withdrawal
description: A flat fee of £2.50 applied to each ATM withdrawal made internationally, with a daily limit of £300.

name: Contactless Payment Fee — £0.00
description: No fee is charged for contactless payments, which are limited to £100 per transaction.

name: Online Purchase Fee — £0.00
description: No fee is charged for online purchases, governed by the Visa limit.

name: Point of Sale Fee — £0.00
description: No fee is charged for point of sale transactions, and there is no set limit.

name: International Purchase Fee — £0.00
description: No transaction fee is charged for international purchases, although a Visa exchange rate of approximately 2% applies.

name: Monthly Maintenance Fee — £0.00
description: The typical monthly cost for a user is £0.00, provided there is no international use of the account.
context: Monthly Cost (Typical User): £0.00 (no fees if no international use)

name: UK ATM Withdrawal
description: The act of withdrawing funds from a UK-based ATM, limited to £500 per day.

name: International ATM Withdrawal
description: The act of withdrawing funds from an ATM outside the UK, limited to £300 per day.

name: Contactless Payment
description: A payment made via contactless technology, limited to £100 per individual transaction.

name: Online Purchase
description: A financial transaction conducted online, subject to Visa limits.

name: Point of Sale Transaction
description: A payment made at a physical point of sale, with no specified transaction limit.

name: International Purchase
description: A payment for goods or services in a foreign currency, involving a Visa exchange rate of approximately 2%.

name: SmartSaver Account
description: A competitive savings product offered by FirstUK Bank characterized by high interest rates and low entry barriers compared to market competitors.
context: Product | FirstUK | Competitor A | Competitor B

name: SmartSaver Tier 1 Rate — 4.50% (<£10k)
description: The interest rate applicable to the first tier of balances under £10,000 for the SmartSaver Account, providing a 4.50% return.

name: SmartSaver Monthly Fee — £0
description: A monthly maintenance charge of £0 applied to the SmartSaver Account, explicitly highlighting the product as free to maintain.

name: SmartSaver Minimum Opening Balance — £1
description: The minimum balance requirement for a customer to open a SmartSaver Account is £1.

name: Current Account
description: A standard current account offered by FirstUK Bank. It is positioned as a low-cost alternative to competitors with no monthly or UK ATM fees.

name: Monthly Fee — £0
description: The monthly maintenance charge for the FirstUK Current Account, which is explicitly set at £0.

name: Current Account Overdraft Rate — 15%
description: The interest rate applied to overdraft balances on the FirstUK Current Account, set at 15%.

name: ATM Fee (UK) — £0
description: The fee charged for using ATMs within the UK with a FirstUK account, which is explicitly set at £0.

name: Pricing Transparency Policy
description: A commitment by FirstUK Bank to ensure all charges are clearly stated and that customers understand their costs, avoiding hidden fees.
context: FirstUK Bank aims for transparency and competitiveness
No Hidden Fees: All charges clearly stated
Clear Communication: Customers understand their costs

name: Quarterly Pricing Review Provision
description: A procedural commitment to review product pricing on a quarterly basis to ensure the bank remains competitive within the market.
context: Regular Review: Quarterly pricing review to stay competitive

name: Competitive Rate Guarantee
description: A service commitment where the bank aims to match or beat the market rates for its key banking products.
context: Competitive Rates: Match or beat market for key products

name: Product Review Schedule
description: The contractual timeline and frequency for reviewing product terms and rates. It specifies a formal review cycle including quarterly updates and monthly adjustments for variable rates tied to the Bank of England.
context: Quarterly Reviews: As market conditions change
Rate Changes: Monthly (for variable rates tied to BoE)

name: SmartSaver
description: A savings product offering variable interest rates between 4.50% and 4.80% depending on the tier.

name: Mortgage
description: A mortgage product with interest rates ranging from 5.00% to 5.75%, varying by specific product and Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio.

name: SmartSaver Tier Rates — 4.50%–4.80% AER
description: Variable interest rates applied to the SmartSaver product, ranging from 4.50% to 4.80% depending on the balance tier.

name: Mortgage Rates — 5.00%–5.75% APR
description: Interest rates for mortgage products ranging from 5.00% to 5.75%, influenced by the specific product selected and the LTV.

name: Interest Tax Liability Clause
description: Provision stating that interest is paid gross without tax deduction, placing the responsibility for HMRC reporting on the customer if they are liable.
context: Customers must report to HMRC if liable.

name: Optional PPI Insurance
description: An optional insurance add-on available for mortgage products; it is not included by default.
context: PPI Insurance: Not included (optional add-on available for mortgages)
